sentences.arabic: فِي يَوْمِ الأُمِّ، يُقَدِّمُ الأَوْلَادُ هَدَايَا لِأُمَّهَاتِهِمْ.
sentences.translation: Na Majčin dan, djeca donose poklone majkama.
sentences.translationEn: On Mother's Day, children give gifts to their mothers.
They buy flowers, sweets, and perfume.
They say to her «I love you, Mom».

sentences.arabic: الأُمُّ تَشْعُرُ بِالسَّعَادَةِ وَتَبْكِي مِنَ الفَرَحِ.
sentences.translation: Majka se osjeća sretno i plače od radosti.
sentences.translationEn: The mother feels happy and cries from joy.

sentences.arabic: الأُمُّ هِيَ أَغْلَى إِنْسَانٍ فِي الحَيَاةِ.
sentences.translation: Majka je najdraža osoba u životu.
sentences.translationEn: The mother is the most precious person in life.
